rootCause: Custom quests rendered their thumbnail images with the data URL as the alt text and lacked an explicit aria-label on the list link. The link's accessible name therefore included the base64 data and description, so the quests page did not expose a link whose accessible name matched the quest title and the e2e quest creation test could not find it.
resolution: Set quest list links to use an aria-label equal to the quest title and updated quest cards to describe thumbnails with human-readable alt text referencing the quest title. Added an e2e assertion to ensure the link keeps its aria-label and alt text aligned with the quest title.
